<parameter=code>
# Check current block position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== Current block position ===")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ['O', 'b'] and node['pixels'] > 5:
        print(f"Color={node['color']}, boundary={node['boundary']}, pixels={node['pixels']}")

# Check the top area
ascii_grid = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Top area (rows 10-30, cols 30-50) ===")
for r in range(10, 31):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_grid[r][30:50]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
